arts.ttl: Club open contact with Everton man’s entourage to ‘understand the feasibility’ of January transfer
arts.sum: Roma have initiated contact with Everton striker Beto’s entourage to discuss the feasibility of a move in the January transfer window. That’s according to Calciomercato, who report that owners the Friedkins are keen to start talks ahead of January to boost Roma’s squad and turn around their fortunes. arts.ttl: Friedkins can turn Everton into ‘strong hypothesis’ for manager – He’s waiting for options to be offered

That’s according to Mais Futebol, who report that Conceição is keen to hold off on taking any jobs to see what comes up in the coming weeks. arts.ttl: How to watch Everton vs Wolves
arts.sum: Everton vs Wolves kicks off at 7.30pm with the Matchday Live stream beginning around 30 minutes ahead of kick-off at 7pm. The show begins about 30 minutes before kick-off at Goodison Park, bringing supporters team news and talking points before the 7.30pm start.
